text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking around campus during my lunch
break...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Mmm! ♪ Yuki, your chocolates were so yummy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Yer choc'lates were real delicious too!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
And the wrapp'n was like a disco ball! Where'dja
get all them choc'lates, anyhow?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heh! Since I'm a mature, grown-up woman, I have
no problem finding all the trendy stores! ☆

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Holy cannoli! You're a real city girl!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Mmhm! Feel free to ask me for advice when it
comes to shopping!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh! Trainer! Over here! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, got tired of waiting for my chocolate,
huh? Can't say I blame you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll talk to you later, Yuki! I've got to do
something suuuuuper grown-up. ☆

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
S-s... someth'n grown-up?! Wh-wh-what's that
s'pposed to mean?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't mean anything, but Mayano Top Gun
drags me away before I can explain that to
Yukino Bijin...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Here you go! Some chocolates from me to you.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heh! Go on, open it! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling the weight of her gaze, I begin to open
the package to find...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An almost unbelievable number of chocolates
packed inside.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I bought the star-shaped ones at a department
store, and the hearts are from the store inside the
station!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I went to a ton of stores all by myself to
get ready for today!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Soooo...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Now you have no choice but to take me on a date
as thanks for all these chocolates!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I agree to her terms, and we go to a chocolate
store for our date.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A chocolate cupcake with a somewhat simple,
homemade feel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chocolate is overflowing from the wrapper in
some places, but it still looks like it was made
with care.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yay!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Say that again once you've eaten it! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heh! It's a one-of-a-kind Maya Cake—you won't
find it anywhere else!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...It's really special, got it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I eat the rest of the slightly-too-sweet chocolate
cupcake bit by bit throughout the day.
